prompt: I want to build a SaaS product login page — give me 3 style directions to compare
expected: Triggers clarifying questions about design context/brand; outputs 3-variation design_canvas; avoids purple gradients/emoji/Inter and other AI slop; has specific reasoning explaining each variation's differentiating dimension
tests: workflow questioning + variations logic + anti-AI slop checklist + design_canvas usage

prompt: Help me make a 10-page product pitch deck for an AI tool startup
expected: Uses deck_stage.js as starting point; first vocalizes design system (color/typography/layout rhythm) and waits for confirmation; alternates Section divider/content/data/quote layouts; font size ≥24px; 1-indexed labels
tests: Junior Designer report-before-execute + deck_stage usage + visual rhythm + scale conventions

prompt: Make a 30-second HTML animation explaining how neural networks work
expected: Uses animations.jsx Stage+Sprite; writes timeline before components; easeOut on enter / easeIn on exit; tells story in phases rather than piling animations; text stays on screen ≥3 seconds
tests: animations workflow + correct easing + rhythm design + duration control

prompt: Make a Habit Tracker App prototype
expected: Asks user for overview layout vs flow demo (defaults to overview); uses assets/ios_frame.jsx, does not hand-code Dynamic Island; Tracker is high-density type — each screen needs ≥3 product-differentiating info elements (habit completion rate, streak count, trend chart, achievement badges, etc., non-decorative); at least 5-7 screens side-by-side (home/new habit/detail/stats/settings)
tests: overview/flow routing + ios_frame hard binding + information density type (high-density) + multi-screen layout

prompt: Make a reading notes App prototype
expected: Overview layout as default; ios_frame.jsx; reading notes leans content-display, information density requirements not as extreme as Tracker, but notes list still needs ≥3 info layers (book, quote, tag, progress); at least 4-6 screens (home bookshelf/note detail/highlights/search/notebook management); serif display typography preferred
tests: overview default + ios_frame + information hierarchy + content-primary visual rhythm

prompt: Make a running log App prototype
expected: Overview layout; ios_frame.jsx; running App is high-density type (map, pace chart, heart rate zones, per-km splits), each screen needs ≥3 product-differentiating info elements; at least 5 screens (today overview/live run data/route map/history/monthly stats); avoid AI slop (no purple gradients, no decorative icon piles, but data-viz icons are fine)
tests: overview + ios_frame + high-density data viz + map/chart mixed layout + slop edge cases
